name: @alfadb/pi-astack
description: alfadb's personal pi workflow + memory infrastructure: extensions, skills, prompts built specifically for pi (similar to how gstack is built for claude-code). Memory architecture: pure markdown+git (project-level .pensieve/, world-level ~/.abrain/); main session read-only via memory_search/get/list/neighbors; sediment sidecar sole writer via memory_write/update/deprecate/promote/relate. gbrain entirely removed (2026-05-07, memory-architecture.md). Vendors garrytan/gstack as port reference; consolidates alfadb-native dispatch / model-curator / model-fallback.
